agents.name: feature-plan
agents.description: Create or revise a decision-complete feature plan and feature state documents.
agents.input: approved feature brief or revision findings

agents.name: feature-review
agents.description: Independently review a feature plan, contracts, risks, and executable phase gates.

agents.name: feature-build
agents.description: Implement exactly one approved feature phase and record scoped evidence.

agents.name: feature-verify
agents.description: Independently verify a completed feature phase without editing implementation files.

agents.name: bug-diagnose
agents.description: Reproduce a bug and identify evidence-backed root cause and minimal repair scope.

agents.name: bug-fix
agents.description: Apply the smallest root-cause fix and add regression coverage.

agents.name: bug-verify
agents.description: Reproduce the original bug and independently verify the repair and regressions.

agents.name: provider-spike
agents.description: Time-box external Provider assumptions and produce reproducible compatibility evidence.

agents.name: security-review
agents.description: Independently review trust boundaries, crypto protocol, Vault, credential grants, and residual risk.

agents.name: ship
agents.description: Run the human-triggered final scope, test, documentation, branch, and release gate.

skills.name: mad-module-classify
skills.purpose: route one task to one owning module

skills.name: mad-feature-brief
skills.purpose: normalize a request into a reviewable brief

skills.name: mad-dashboard-sync
skills.purpose: refresh and verify machine dashboard facts
